name: TestFairy
description: TestFairy — Mobile beta distribution and session recording platform for iOS and Android app testing and distribution.

seo.title: TestFairy — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: TestFairy: TestFairy — Mobile beta distribution and session recording platform for iOS and Android app testing and distribution.

when_to_use: Mobile beta distribution to testers via enterprise store
Session recording for iOS and Android crash reproduction
Crash logs with video replay for mobile bug reports
Controlled beta rollout with tester feedback collection

pros: Mobile beta distribution with session recording
Handles iOS and Android in one platform
Insights into real user testing sessions
cons: Acquired by Sauce Labs, product in flux
TestFlight and App Center cover similar needs
review.verdict: Interesting for session replay, but most mobile teams use TestFlight plus Firebase App Distribution instead.
review.best_for: Mobile teams needing session recording alongside beta distribution
review.not_for: Teams happy with TestFlight or Firebase App Distribution for beta builds
